STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_WOOD_POWER.title: Plank
STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_STRESS_POWER.title: Stress
STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_STRESS_POWER.descrip: When you gain materials from [gold]cards[/gold], consume [blue]1[/blue] stack once per resolution to double that gain. Powers, relics, and other non-card sources ignore Stress.
STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_STRESS_POWER.smartDe: When you gain materials from [gold]cards[/gold], consume [blue]1[/blue] stack once per resolution to double that gain. Powers, relics, and other non-card sources ignore Stress.
STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_DIGGING_POWER.title: Digging
STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_DIGGING_POWER.descri: Whenever you mine, gain [blue]1[/blue] additional [gold]Plank[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] additional [gold]Cobblestone[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_DIGGING_POWER.smartD: Whenever you mine, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional {Amount:plural:[gold]Plank[/gold]|[gold]Planks[/gold]} and [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional {Amount:plural:[gold]Cobblestone[/gold]|[gold]Cobblestones[/gold]}.

STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_IRON_POWER.title: Iron Ingot
